description: Closely automates personalized LinkedIn and email outreach with AI sequences and built-in contact enrichment, syncing replies and leads to your CRM.
overview: Closely runs automated, personalized LinkedIn and email campaigns with AI-assisted messaging and built-in enrichment, syncing contacts and replies with major CRMs.
what_is: Closely is an outreach tool that automates personalized LinkedIn and email campaigns. It sends human-like sequences and is quick to set up, so teams can launch multichannel campaigns in minutes without technical work.

It fits sales teams, recruiters, marketers, and agencies that need efficient lead generation and engagement. Automating prospecting frees up hours each week, and built-in enrichment adds verified emails and phone numbers to the contacts you reach.

Closely integrates with CRMs like HubSpot, Salesforce, and Pipedrive to keep contacts, messages, and replies in sync. It is built for LinkedIn-led multichannel outreach rather than complex marketing automation or email-only campaigns.
